pageIntro: The standards that keep our franchise strong and our community welcoming.

sections.heading: Be Respectful
sections.body: Treat all members, fans, event organizers, and the public with courtesy, dignity, and respect at all times — both online and in person.

sections.heading: Represent the Franchise Well
sections.body: When in costume or at events, you represent Ghostbusters Virginia and the broader Ghostbusters community. Conduct yourself professionally, stay in character appropriately, and keep the experience fun and welcoming for everyone — especially kids.

sections.heading: No Discrimination or Harassment
sections.body: Ghostbusters Virginia has zero tolerance for discrimination, harassment, or bullying based on race, gender, sexual orientation, disability, religion, or any other characteristic. We're all here because we love Ghostbusters.

sections.heading: Keep It Family-Friendly
sections.body: Our events often involve children and families. Language, behavior, and social media posts representing GBVA should be appropriate for all ages.

sections.heading: Follow Event Rules
sections.body: Respect the rules and policies of every venue and event we attend. This includes parking, prop handling, restricted areas, and photo policies. If you're unsure, ask a coordinator.

sections.heading: Support Charitable Missions
sections.body: GBVA exists to give back. Participate in good faith in charity drives, community events, and fundraisers. Never use a GBVA event for personal commercial gain without authorization.

sections.heading: Report Concerns
sections.body: If you experience or witness behavior that violates this Code of Conduct, report it to a franchise officer immediately. All reports will be handled discreetly and taken seriously.

sections.heading: Consequences
sections.body: Violations may result in a warning, suspension, or removal from the franchise depending on severity. Serious violations (legal offenses, threats, etc.) will result in immediate removal and may be reported to authorities.

metaDescription: Ghostbusters Virginia's Code of Conduct — the standards we uphold as a franchise and community.
ogDescription: Our commitment to respect, professionalism, and community as Ghostbusters Virginia members.
